name: Mandev Tubes
summary: Two plants secured — 78 cameras at Plant 1 and 48 at Plant 2, 126 in total.
challenge: Two separate plants in Umbergaon needed surveillance scaled to each site's size.
solution: Konect installed 78 cameras at Plant 1 and 48 at Plant 2 — 126 cameras across the two facilities.
result: Both plants are covered to a consistent standard, sized appropriately to each site.
